creator: danfe@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback

It looks like you're running -CURRENT, which has harder restrictions on 
matching kernel and userland.  As -CURRENT is a constantly moving target, 
there's little chance that OSVERSION which package is built against will 
match your environment (hence the error you're seeing). 

Does it happen on stable (released) FreeBSD versions as well?  For -CURRENT, 
you would probably be happy with building from source code, just for the 
sake of extra (ABI) safety.
